task: Compute HEDIS Breast Cancer Screening (BCS) measure. Women 50-74 (denominator); numerator = at least one mammogram in the 27-month measurement period. Bilateral mastectomy is an exclusion. Output: { measure, numerator, denominator, rate, members[] }.

recipes.name: hedis-bcs
recipes.source: function generate(input,lib){var b=(input&&input.bundle)||{},es=Array.isArray(b.entry)?b.entry:[],R=(lib.pack&&lib.pack.rules)||{},MC=R.mammogram_cpt||['77067'],MH=R.mammogram_hcpcs||['G0202'],EC=R.bilateral_mastectomy_cpt||[],EI=R.bilateral_mastectomy_icd10||['Z90.13'],AR=R.age_range||{min:50,max:74},MY=(input&&input.measurement_year)||2024,end=new Date(MY+1,2,31).getTime(),start=end-27*30*24*3600*1000,P={},MM={},EX={};function pid(r){return r.subject&&(r.subject.reference||'').split('/').pop()||r.id||'';}for(var i=0;i<es.length;i++){var r=(es[i]&&es[i].resource)||{},t=r.resourceType||'',k=pid(r);if(t==='Patient')P[r.id||k]={bd:r.birthDate||null,gen:r.gender||null};else if(t==='Procedure'){var cd=(r.code&&r.code.coding&&r.code.coding[0]||{}).code||'',dt=r.performedDateTime||'',tm=dt?new Date(dt).getTime():0;if(MC.indexOf(cd)>=0||MH.indexOf(cd)>=0){if(tm>=start&&tm<=end)MM[k]={date:dt,system:MC.indexOf(cd)>=0?'cpt':'hcpcs',code:cd};}if(EC.indexOf(cd)>=0)EX[k]=true;}else if(t==='Condition'){var ic=(r.code&&r.code.coding&&r.code.coding[0]||{}).code||'';if(EI.indexOf(ic)>=0)EX[k]=true;}}var n=0,d=0,M=[];for(var k2 in P){var age=MY-parseInt((P[k2].bd||'1900').slice(0,4),10),gen=(P[k2].gen||'').toLowerCase();if(gen!=='female'||age<AR.min||age>AR.max)continue;if(EX[k2])continue;d++;var q=MM[k2]||null,sc=!!q;if(sc)n++;M.push({member_id_redacted:'<hash>',age:age,qualifying_screening:q,excluded:false,screened:sc});}return{measure:'BCS',spec:'NCQA HEDIS MY 2024+',numerator:n,denominator:d,rate:d?n/d:0,members:M};}

pack.description: HEDIS BCS rule library. mammogram_cpt covers screening (77067) and diagnostic (77065, 77066) mammography CPT codes. mammogram_hcpcs G0202 is HCPCS for digital screening mammography. Bilateral mastectomy exclusions use ICD-10 Z90.13 and CPT 19303-19307.
